description: Create an object by server-side copying data from another object.
examples:
Command Example
#
!minio-copy-object bucket_name_src="test12" name_src="test_source.txt" bucket_name_dst="test12" name_dst="test_destination.txt"
!minio-copy-object bucket_name_src="test12" name_src="test_source.txt" bucket_name_dst="test12" name_dst="myFolder/test_destination.txt"
(It will create the folder
myFolder
)
Context Example

!minio-copy-object bucket_name_src="test12" name_src="test_source.txt" bucket_name_dst="test12" name_dst="test_destination.txt"
!minio-copy-object bucket_name_src="test12" name_src="test_source.txt" bucket_name_dst="test12" name_dst="myFolder/test_destination.txt"
(It will create the folder
myFolder
)
Context Example
#
{

!minio-copy-object bucket_name_src="test12" name_src="test_source.txt" bucket_name_dst="test12" name_dst="myFolder/test_destination.txt"
(It will create the folder
myFolder
)
